title: Gravitational Blocks
description: An overhaul mod with gravity monsters and weird blocks
body:
![stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c6aacdaeedc033c82335b29c506dfc25d208e38.png):



Gravitational Blocks adds strange new mobs, really weird blocks, and other stuff!

The Archived is a planet-like mob that can fly and drops archives.

The Bedrocked spawns in the Void Caves biome and drops voidstone and a new music disc.

<details> <summary>Spoiler 👀</summary>
  
![Bedrocked](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/359e49f5ab3b927d2ac2aa8e178f8aaa5d328167.png)

</details>
The Task Manager looks like a Windows XP task manager and drops task chips.

The Glitcher has no eyes and drops folders and sometimes glitch blocks.

The Void Portal also spawns in the Void Caves. When hurt, it spawns all of the other mobs. When killed drops void keys.

Void Spawners are crafted with void keys and voidstone. They work the same way as the Void Portal.

Glitch Chips can be crafted using task chips and a glitch block. They give the player levitation.

Void Caves is a new biome you can explore.
The explosive update is out now! it adds a new otherworldly location with 2 new mobs and a lot of explosive items and blocks, and also a few utility items.

This mod was made with MCreator
